rules: .emulator-root { background: black; overflow: hidden; user-select: none; touch-action: none; }
.emulator-canvas, .emulator-video { image-rendering: pixelated; user-select: none; touch-action: none; }
.emulator-video { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: none; }
.emulator-loading { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: black; color: white; font-weight: bold; }
.emulator-loading-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; width: 100%; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }
.emulator-loading-pre-2 { margin: 1em 0px; font-size: 2vw; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 100; text-transform: uppercase; }
.emulator-loader { background: url("emulators-ui-loader.png") 0% 0% / cover no-repeat; width: 50px; height: 50px; }

.emulator-control-exit-fullscreen-icon { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'%3F%3E%3C!-- Generator: Adobe Illustrator 17.1.0, SVG Export Plug-In . SVG Version: 6.00 Build 0) --%3E%3C!DOCTYPE svg PUBLIC '-//W3C//DTD SVG 1.1//EN' 'http://www.w3.org/Graphics/SVG/1.1/DTD/svg11.dtd'%3E%3Csvg version='1.1' id='Layer_1' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink' x='0px' y='0px' viewBox='0 0 16 16' enable-background='new 0 0 16 16' xml:space='preserve'%3E%3Cg id='minimize_1_' fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Cg%3E%3Cpath fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M15.99,0.99c0-0.55-0.45-1-1-1c-0.28,0-0.53,0.11-0.71,0.29l-3.29,3.29V1.99 c0-0.55-0.45-1-1-1s-1,0.45-1,1v4c0,0.55,0.45,1,1,1h4c0.55,0,1-0.45,1-1s-0.45-1-1-1h-1.59L15.7,1.7 C15.88,1.52,15.99,1.27,15.99,0.99z M5.99,8.99h-4c-0.55,0-1,0.45-1,1s0.45,1,1,1h1.59l-3.29,3.29c-0.18,0.18-0.29,0.43-0.29,0.71 c0,0.55,0.45,1,1,1c0.28,0,0.53-0.11,0.71-0.29l3.29-3.29v1.59c0,0.55,0.45,1,1,1s1-0.45,1-1v-4C6.99,9.44,6.54,8.99,5.99,8.99z' /%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E") !important; }
.emulator-click-to-start-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-direction: column; display: none; }
.emulator-click-to-start-text { color: white; font-size: 2em; margin: 0px 0px 1em; font-family: monospace; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: normal; }

.emulator-click-to-start-icon { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg version='1.1' id='Layer_1' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink' x='0px' y='0px' viewBox='0 0 20 20' enable-background='new 0 0 20 20' xml:space='preserve'%3E%3Cg id='play_1_'%3E%3Cg%3E%3Cpath fill='%23FFF' fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M16,10c0-0.36-0.2-0.67-0.49-0.84l0.01-0.01l-10-6L5.51,3.16 C5.36,3.07,5.19,3,5,3C4.45,3,4,3.45,4,4v12c0,0.55,0.45,1,1,1c0.19,0,0.36-0.07,0.51-0.16l0.01,0.01l10-6l-0.01-0.01 C15.8,10.67,16,10.36,16,10z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E"); width: 64px; height: 64px; }
.emulator-fullscreen-workaround { inset: 0px; background: black; z-index: 999; position: fixed !important; }

.emulator-button-touch-zone, .emulator-button { cursor: pointer; user-select: none; touch-action: none; overflow: hidden; background: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; filter: opacity(0.8); }

.emulator-button-touch-zone { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-style: solid; box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) 0px 0px 2px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) 0px 0px 2px 2px inset; }

.emulator-button { position: absolute; background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.5); background-size: 50%; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center center; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) -1px -1px 0px, rgb(0, 0, 0) 1px -1px 0px, rgb(0, 0, 0) -1px 1px 0px, rgb(0, 0, 0) 1px 1px 0px; text-align: center; box-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 1px; }

.emulator-control-select { overflow: hidden; background: none; color: white; border-radius: 10%; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 1px; user-select: none; touch-action: none; filter: opacity(0.7); }
.emulator-options { justify-content: flex-end; flex-flow: wrap-reverse; display: flex; user-select: none; touch-action: none; }
.emulator-keyboard { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 999; color: black; user-select: none; touch-action: none; }

.notyf { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100%; width: 100%; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: flex-end; pointer-events: none; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 20px; }
.notyf__icon--error, .notyf__icon--success { height: 21px; width: 21px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; display: block; margin: 0px auto; position: relative; }

.notyf__icon--error::after, .notyf__icon--error::before { content: ""; background: currentcolor; display: block; position: absolute; width: 3px; border-radius: 3px; left: 9px; height: 12px; top: 5px; }
.notyf__icon--success::after, .notyf__icon--success::before { content: ""; background: currentcolor; display: block; position: absolute; width: 3px; border-radius: 3px; }

.notyf__toast { display: block; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: auto; animation: 0.3s ease-in 0s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeinup; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px 3px 7px 0px; position: relative; padding: 0px 15px; border-radius: 2px; max-width: 300px; transform: translateY(25%); box-sizing: border-box; flex-shrink: 0; }
.notyf__toast--disappear { transform: translateY(0px); animation: 0.3s ease 0.25s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeoutdown; }
.notyf__toast--disappear .notyf__icon, .notyf__toast--disappear .notyf__message { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeoutdown; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0px); }
.notyf__toast--disappear .notyf__dismiss { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeoutright; opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0px); }

.notyf__ripple { height: 400px; width: 400px; position: absolute; transform-origin: right bottom; right: 0px; top: 0px; border-radius: 50%; transform: scale(0) translateY(-51%) translateX(13%); z-index: 5; animation: 0.4s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running ripple; }
.notyf__wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-top: 17px; padding-bottom: 17px; padding-right: 15px; border-radius: 3px; position: relative; z-index: 10; }
.notyf__icon { width: 22px; text-align: center; font-size: 1.3em; opacity: 0; animation: 0.3s ease 0.3s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeinup; margin-right: 13px; }
.notyf__dismiss { position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 100%; width: 26px; margin-right: -15px; animation: 0.3s ease 0.35s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeinleft; opacity: 0; }
.notyf__dismiss-btn { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s, background-color 0.2s; outline: none; opacity: 0.35; height: 100%; width: 100%; }

.notyf__dismiss-btn::after, .notyf__dismiss-btn::before { content: ""; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); height: 12px; width: 2px; border-radius: 3px; position: absolute; left: calc(50% - 1px); top: calc(50% - 5px); }
.notyf__message { vertical-align: middle; position: relative; opacity: 0; animation: 0.3s ease 0.25s 1 normal forwards running notyf-fadeinup; line-height: 1.5em; }
.hg-theme-default { width: 100%; user-select: none; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; touch-action: manipulation; }

.hg-theme-default { font-family: HelveticaNeue-Light, "Helvetica Neue Light", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, "Lucida Grande", sans-serif; background-color: rgb(236, 236, 236); padding: 5px; border-radius: 5px; }

.hg-theme-default .hg-button { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 3px -1px; height: 40px; border-radius: 5px; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 5px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(181, 181, 181); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); }
.hg-theme-default.hg-layout-numeric .hg-button { width: 33.3%; height: 60px; align-items: center; display: flex; justify-content: center; }

.transform { --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; transform: translateX(var(--tw-translate-x))
        translateY(var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate))
        skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y))
        scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }
.animate-spin { animation: 1s linear 0s infinite normal none running spin; }
.animate-pulse { animation: 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) 0s infinite normal none running pulse; }
.font-mono { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace; }

.shadow { --tw-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); box-shadow: var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow, 0 0 #0000),
        var(--tw-ring-shadow, 0 0 #0000), var(--tw-shadow); }

.sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; border-bottom-width: 2px; --tw-border-opacity: 1; border-color: rgba(167, 243, 208, var(--tw-border-opacity)); padding-bottom: 0.5rem; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase; --tw-text-opacity: 1; color: rgba(75, 85, 99, var(--tw-text-opacity)); }

select { border-radius: 0.25rem; border-width: 1px; --tw-border-opacity: 1; border-color: rgba(167, 243, 208, var(--tw-border-opacity)); --tw-bg-opacity: 1; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, var(--tw-bg-opacity)); padding-left: 0.5rem; padding-right: 0.5rem; }
body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif; margin: 0px; }
code { font-family: source-code-pro, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; }
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p { margin: 0px; }
p { font-family: Millennium, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; font-size: 18px; }
p b { font-family: MillenniumBold, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; }
h2 { font-family: MillenniumBold, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; font-size: 32px; }
h3, h4 { font-family: MillenniumBold, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; letter-spacing: 0px; }

:root { --button-highlight: #fff; --button-face: #747474; --button-shadow: grey; --window-frame: #2b2b2b; --surface: silver; --surface-hover: #e9e9e9; --border-field: inset -1px -1px var(--button-highlight),inset 1px 1px var(--button-shadow),inset -2px -2px var(--button-face),inset 2px 2px var(--window-frame); --border-raised-outer: inset -1px -1px var(--window-frame),inset 1px 1px var(--button-highlight); --border-raised-inner: inset -2px -2px var(--button-shadow),inset 2px 2px var(--button-face); }
.big-button-container { box-shadow: var(--border-raised-outer),var(--border-raised-inner); cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; padding: 24px; }
input, textarea { border: none; box-shadow: var(--border-field); box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Millennium, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; padding: 4px 8px; resize: none; width: 100%; }
input:active, input:focus, textarea:active, textarea:focus { background-color: rgb(251, 255, 196); outline: none; }
.button-border, .site-button { background: var(--surface-hover); border: none; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: var(--border-raised-outer),var(--border-raised-inner); box-sizing: border-box; }
.site-button { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); cursor: pointer; font-family: Millennium; font-size: 18px; overflow: hidden; padding: 4px 12px; user-select: none; }
.captioned-image { align-items: center; align-self: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; margin-bottom: 32px; text-align: center; width: 100%; }
.text-block { display: flex; flex-direction: column; margin-bottom: 32px; margin-top: 16px; text-align: justify; }
.site-page { inset: 0px; display: flex; overflow: hidden; position: absolute; transform: translateZ(0px); }
.site-page-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; margin-left: 300px; overflow-y: scroll; padding: 32px 64px 64px 16px; width: 100%; }
.loading::after { animation: 1s step-end 0s infinite normal none running dotty; content: ""; display: inline-block; }
.arrow-mount { animation: 0.2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running arrow; transition: opacity; }

.rainbow-wrapper { animation: 18s ease 0s infinite normal none running rainbow; background: linear-gradient(124deg, rgb(255, 36, 0), rgb(232, 29, 29), rgb(232, 183, 29), rgb(227, 232, 29), rgb(29, 232, 64), rgb(29, 221, 232), rgb(43, 29, 232), rgb(221, 0, 243), rgb(221, 0, 243)) 0% 0% / 1800% 1800%; }

.shortcut-border { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' fill='none' stroke='%23ea3323' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='1,1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); }

.selected-shortcut-border { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' fill='none' stroke='%23fff' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='1,1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); }
.start-menu-option:hover { background-color: rgb(0, 0, 170); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); cursor: pointer; }
.App { height: 100vh; image-rendering: pixelated; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; }
body, html { height: 100%; margin: 0px; overflow: hidden; }
.blinking-cursor { animation: 0.65s step-end 0s infinite normal none running blink; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); height: 0.15em; width: 0.8em; }
